top_signals.title: Applied Aerospace Shares Rise 3.75% After $650 Million US IPO
top_signals.summary: Shares of Applied Aerospace & Defense Inc. rose about 3.75% in its trading debut, after the space and defense engineering firm raised $650 million in an initial public offering priced near the top of a marketed range.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: OpenAI upgrades GPT-5.5, as it plans to retire legacy ChatGPT models
top_signals.summary: OpenAI says it's rolling out a new update that improves the existing GPT-5.5 Instant model, and this move comes ahead of the scheduled retirement of multiple legacy models, including o3. [...]
